offensive_abilities.name: Hauler
offensive_abilities.text: This vehicle is designed to transport heavy cargo over long distances. It can hold 400 Bulk of cargo.

offensive_abilities.name: Sluggish
offensive_abilities.text: This vehicle must move twice its length for each 90-degree turn it makes.

offensive_abilities.name: Wind-Up
offensive_abilities.text: 1 hour of wind-up, 8 hours of operational time, DC 18, standby

statistics.space: 10 feet long, 10 feet wide, 7 feet high

stat_block.text: A clockwork wagon is a slow, bulky wagon with cogs and gears running all along its interior and exterior, allowing it to pull about twice as much cargo as an ordinary wagon. However, it has less passenger space than an ordinary cart.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.
